violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Damp cloth on prep table left of cook line. -Cookline sani buckets found at less than 150ppm Quat solutions. *Corrected on-site to 400ppm. -Sani bucket at prep area found with 500ppm Quat solution. *May need service/adjustment at kitchen Quat sani dispenser.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Damaged gasket and broken door handle on right side make table. *Gaskets are ordered but are delayed due to required modification. -Monitor temperature frequently to ensure products are maintained at 41F or less. -Broken/damaged door handle at upright freezer.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Pink debris at bottom edge of interior panel of ice machine.--Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Dried food debris at blade of commercial can opener. -Frost build up at freezer compartment of small refrigerator. -Dust/debris at fans of salad Pepsi cooler.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Residue build up at floor below dry storage shelf. -Debris/residue at hot hold floor corner. -Residue/debris below cookline equipment. -Dust at top of emergency light. -Some dust/debris at walk in cooler and walk in freezer fans. -Residue at floor drain below bar sinks.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. -Employee food (baggie of chocolate cherries) stored commingling with foods in refrigerator with back up salad items.
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
